feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I was showing a friend how to use the terminal and that it's nothing to be afrai…
entry.content: I was showing a friend how to use the terminal and that it's nothing to be afraid of, and forgot that I had shell-mommy set up. What can I do to save my ass?

entry.title: /int/ International: do anglos have a tendency to take things too far too fast? sometimes feels almos…
entry.content: do anglos have a tendency to take things too far too fast? sometimes feels almost as if once they come up with a new idea in their country, they attempt to implement it yesterday come hell or high water, and then if it doesn't work in two weeks they try to reverse it. and as such, they'd end up with a lot of angry people who never felt like they were heard. does that make any sense?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Alanah Pearce has a very strange work history. People were suspicious of her Bol…
entry.content: Alanah Pearce has a very strange work history. People were suspicious of her Boltgun 2 hiring, but we should also discuss her other “qualifications” and potential real job. There’s a lot of details that don’t add up. One thing is her completely inconsistent jobs and qualifications. She suddenly was hired at Sony for a writing job despite no previous experience and even having spelling errors in her own hiring post. She claimed to help write on God of War: Ragnorok but when people found the credi

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Imagine being Stockton’s wife and kids. It’s the one year anniversary of your da…
entry.content: Imagine being Stockton’s wife and kids. It’s the one year anniversary of your dad dying in a horrible tragedy, your still trying to piece your life back together, you turn on the tv and see James Cameron is STILL going on about how your dad was a retard who deserved to die

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: 8 gigabytes of VRAM
entry.content: All memes aside, you guys do realize you *literally* don't need more, right? Whatever graphical upgrade you get by bumping textures from high to very high will literally not be noticeable by most users in a blind test, same with ray tracing, volumetrics etc. Anything above 8GB is buying enterprise specs for a consumer level workload

entry.title: /g/ Technology: why people dont understand cooling
entry.content: there seems to be lack of understanding on /g/ people about how laptop and desktop CPU works in desktop you have huge CPU collers BECAUSE ITS REQUIRED for powerful CPU in laptop you never have more than half on an inch thick block on top of CPU people dont seem to get to their thick skulls that due to this difference a laptop CPU is never quite as powerful as a desktop CPU assuming both are same generation and same tech of CPU and we didnt even began to talk about power brick and battery require

entry.title: /int/ International: I think that much of Greek mental state and behavior can be explained by the fac…
entry.content: I think that much of Greek mental state and behavior can be explained by the fact that they have to throw their diarrhea soaked toilet paper into a little bin near the toilet and then tie up and take it out when it gets full instead of just flushing it down the toilet.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Where did Diaochan go? Where is the bit about Sun Ce being killed in an ambush? …
entry.content: Where did Diaochan go? Where is the bit about Sun Ce being killed in an ambush? Cao Cao does a lot less in this one than he does in the 2010 version. The costumes and sets weirdly seem better in this version though. They show Cao Cao accidentally treading on the wheat when in the 2010 he deliberately does it. No fake weeping over his father's death. Which do you prefer? Are there any other good chinese tv shows?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: First Car
entry.content: I live in the UK and am looking to get my first car should I get a shitbox for relatively cheap or something newer on finance etc? I have a well paying job (over £2k take home a month) what other things should I know about insurance, tax etc?

entry.title: /news/ News: Prime minister of the United Kingdom Sir Keir Starmer resigns
entry.content: https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/live/ckg er03mrl0t UK Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer resigns after 716 days in office. Unable to surmount an ever growing list of controversies, scandals, ministerial resignations, and the lowest ever recorded approval rating for a prime minister, he has at the urging of his party agreed to step down and set out a timetable for a leadership contest of the Labour party, despite previous claims he would fight any contest.

entry.content: I'm running out of money

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I think they realize that people shouldn't use the internet. It reduces their po…
entry.content: I think they realize that people shouldn't use the internet. It reduces their power over the people. That's why components are expensive now. They will price more than half of the population out of the internet within a decade.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Faggots crept toward the nice old board, Carrying sickness as their reward. “We’…
entry.content: Faggots crept toward the nice old board, Carrying sickness as their reward. “We’ll spread our cancer,” the faggots said— But we stood firm and blocked their spread. The board stayed bright, the faggots fled; Their rot found no place to raise its head. Together we stopped their crawling plan— The board stayed safe because we can.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I always disable IPv6. Reddit and orange reddit get mad at me, say I hamper prog…
entry.content: I always disable IPv6. Reddit and orange reddit get mad at me, say I hamper progress. Worse privacy and security is progress? Well, fuck you and your IPv6 then. They also say you can't host stuff on IPv4 with NAT. That's a lie. So what's with all this IPv6 shilling?

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2883
entry.content: >Bǎi Nián Shāngtòng Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I didn't enjoy Super Mario Sunshine all that much and i played it as a kid, so t…
entry.content: I didn't enjoy Super Mario Sunshine all that much and i played it as a kid, so that's with the benefit of nostalgia. The movement tech was cool I just didn't really enjoy the combat aspect and also thought cleaning up ink was a chore. I don't like things in games that feel like chores, it's why I don't enjoy games like house flipper. The best parts of the game were when you entered those self contained areas in levels where you'd jump along floating platforms and try to reach the end. I like ran

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Did you know you can't say "nigger" on /bant/? It's one of the few words you can…
entry.content: Did you know you can't say "nigger" on /bant/? It's one of the few words you can't say. Of course it was fine for me to say "nigger" just then because i was telling you that you can't say "nigger". I wasn't actually saying "nigger" it was kind of like a public service, just so you don't go and accidentally say "nigger" on /bant/. What's really interesting is that you definitely can't say "crush filthy niggers". But you can say "in a trash compactor" because that's its own sentence. It has nothin

entry.title: /news/ News: USA vs Germany drug pricing conflict
entry.content: >The United States has launched a trade investigation into Germany over its plans to cut spending on pharmaceuticals. >U.S. Trade Representative Jameson Greer says the probe is looking into whether Berlin's drug pricing policies are unfair or discriminatory towards American companies. >The investigation comes under Section 301 of the U.S. Trade Act and could lead to tariffs on German exports if Washington finds evidence of unfair practice. >Germany is facing growing financial pressure on its pub

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I hate 'beef'
entry.content: I hate beef, feuds, and drama. I just want to listen to everyone's good music. I don't want to be in a console war but for musical artists. I don't want a bunch of people on the internet to be mad at me because I also listen to the artist their Fave is 'beefing' with. I don't want a great song or album from 12 years ago to be clouded by the fact that half the features on the album now hate each other. I hate beef.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: A pretty fun watch/listen
entry.content: Dua Lipa's Live in Mexico album is one of the best live performances in my limited point of view. I was more enthusiastic about it a week ago but I'm bored so I'm bring it up here now. Favs Break My Heart Watcha Doing Because the album has the live performances as well as the studio versions of the setlist, all hits and none of the lesser tracks, I think this is definitively Lipa's best value release. Not that I have much to use to say about her limited discography.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Lossless Webp
entry.content: Webpgoy from umi here: What does /g/ think of lossless Webp? To clarify I'm not the site owner, I'm just another image codec autist. >Relative to lossless JXL filesize, how close in compression does a given lossless image codec get? That's what I'm trying to answer here. A dozen common type 1920x1080 PNG images were used. 4chan still doesn't support lossless Webp but umi does, so I'll post the oxiPNG files here and lossless Webp ones in umi. https://umigalaxy.com/explore/gener al/785-lossless-we

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I've been thinking a lot about gratitude as the mother of all virtues. And I thi…
entry.content: I've been thinking a lot about gratitude as the mother of all virtues. And I think I'm right in saying this. I think you would give me everything you own in 25 years' time to be the age you are now and as healthy as you are right now. And I think it's a really interesting meditation to think about, right? If you had a time machine, if you were 30 years in the future, if you could be this healthy and feel this good and be this age, you'd give everything materially that you own in 30 years' time t

entry.content: LMAO. Tyrone and Eduardo strike again

entry.title: /g/ Technology: AI's like a drug I'm trying to wean myself off. I can feel myself forgetting how…
entry.content: AI's like a drug I'm trying to wean myself off. I can feel myself forgetting how to code. I write a few lines and as soon as I hit a snag I have to resist the urge to offload thinking to the machine. It trains you to surrender and get on your knees at the slightest friction. For midwits like me, it's like cognitive heroin. What do I do?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: A lot of people think their life is terrible because there's kind of the hedonic…
entry.content: A lot of people think their life is terrible because there's kind of the hedonic treadmill. You get used to how great your life is. No one had a hot shower until 50 years ago. So I try and do this thing when you stand in a hot shower. George Mack, my friend, pointed this out to me. He went, "Well, look, when you stand in a hot shower, just for a moment, just go, well, no one that you admire from 100 years ago had this simple pleasure in life." We are in the top, top percentile in terms of the lu

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Edit PDF Metadata
entry.content: How do I edit a pdf's metadata including the xmp info? I tried opening in notepad and editing just the dates because you know, we need it to go back a few weeks, but couldnt get the pdf to open after that. Exiftool leaves a trace that it has been edited so thats no bueno. Seems like all the online website tools use exiftool. How do i do this? Im not a software developer or anything but i can run simple command line commands. Thank you
